AUSTRALIA_POST_GRADUATE_VISA_INFO.title: Subclass 485: Temporary Graduate Visa Information
description: The **Post-Higher Education Work stream** allows international students to live, study, and work in Australia temporarily after they have finished their studies.

list: **Age:** Must be **35 years of age or under** when the student applies.
**Qualification:** Must have a recent degree in a **CRICOS-registered course**.
**Police Check:** Must provide evidence the student has applied for an **Australian Federal Police check** when they apply.
**English Test:** Must provide evidence of the required level of English with the application.

description: The student might qualify for the **Second Post-Higher Education Work stream** if:

list: The **regional location** of the educational institution from which the student graduated led to the grant of their first Temporary Graduate visa.
The **regional area** that the student lives in as the holder of their Temporary Graduate visa is in the Post-Higher Education Work, Post-Study Work, or Replacement stream.
Studied and live in a **Category 2 area (1 year)** (exceptions apply for Tasmania).
Studied and live in a **Category 3 area (2 years)**.

description: For more information about the Post-Higher Education Work stream, [click here](https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/getting-a-visa/visa-listing/temporary-graduate-485/post-higher-education-work).

For more information about the Second Post-Higher Education Work stream, [click here](https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/getting-a-visa/visa-listing/temporary-graduate-485/second-post-higher-education-work).

AUSTRALIA_POST_GRADUATE_VISA_VOCATIONAL_.title: Subclass 485: Temporary Graduate Visa Information
description: The **Post-Vocational Education Work stream** allows international students to live, study, and work in Australia temporarily after they have finished their studies.

list: **Age:** Must be **35 years of age or under** when the student applies.

**Qualification:** The student must have an associate degree, diploma, or trade qualification relevant to an occupation on the [skilled occupation list](https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/skill-occupation-list).
**Skills Assessment:** The student must have applied for a skills assessment in their nominated occupation on the skilled occupation list.
**Police Check:** The student must provide evidence that they have applied for an Australian Federal Police check.
**English Test:** The student must provide evidence of the required level of English with their application.
